concepts_used.title: 元胞自动机
concepts_used.how_used: 使用 NetLogo 构建基于智能体的模型，模拟每个运动员在赛道上的运动、超车和拥堵情况。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We developed an agent-based model in NetLogo, using data taken from a previous triathlon to determine the apportionment of athlete sex and segment times.

concepts_used.title: 常用图表类型及选择指南
concepts_used.how_used: 使用图表展示不同方案下的拥堵减少百分比，如三车道系统减少72%拥堵。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: The three-lane system decreases congestion by 72% relative to a base model with no lanes.

concepts_used.title: 灵敏度分析
concepts_used.how_used: 测试不同波包间隔时间（如4分钟）对拥堵和道路关闭时间的影响，找到最优值。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: By testing our model with various values for the separation time between wave-packets, we found that separating wave-packets by 4 minutes would minimize congestion while keeping the road closure time under 5.5 hours.

concepts_used.title: 三天/四天赛程时间分配
concepts_used.how_used: 设计波包出发时间表，每4分钟释放一组55名运动员，总赛程约7小时。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Using our model, we determined that the 2000 athletes should be placed into groups of 55, with 14 fast athletes, 27 medium athletes and 14 slow athletes in each group, and the groups should be deployed every four minutes.

concepts_used.title: 模型假设的写法
concepts_used.how_used: 列出运动员定义、赛道定义、截止时间、分组等假设，为模型建立基础。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Definitions: Athlete: Individual participant in the race. Course: The terrain (water or road) that the athlete traverses during the entirety of the race. Cutoff Time: The time (hh:mm:ss) that is the dividing boundary of two divisions/group-s/categories.
